metadata.methodology: Multi-dimensional performance analysis with savage commentary

complexity_score.measurement: Static analysis of XML blocks, dependencies, abstractions

token_density.measurement: Character count as token proxy / actual functionality

abstraction_violation.measurement: Interfaces without 3+ implementations, factory patterns, etc.

usability_index.description: How easily a human can actually use this
usability_index.measurement: Parameter complexity, documentation clarity, example quality

maintenance_burden.description: How much pain this will cause in 6 months
